questionHtml: Determine, using the diagram or otherwise, the space coordinate x′ of event R in S′.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

Using diagram:

line from R parallel to prime ct axis until it intersects space axis ✓

use of scale from (b) to estimate coordinate to x' = (1.3 ± 0.2) ly ✓

 

ALTERNATIVE 2

Using Lorentz transformation:

event R has coordinates x = ct = 4.00 ly in S ✓

so x' = «y(x − vt) = 53 × (4.00 − 0.80 × 4.00)» = 1.33 ly ✓

meta.title: Determine, using the diagram or otherwise, the space coordinate x′ of event R in S′.
